ab: i tjuma’ tji vuvu?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: izua na tae’d i tua aqerengang njimadju?
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: izua tji vuvu i tjuma’?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: neka’ ri .tjau vaivaik. nu masuljem anga ki pantjez.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: izua tji vuvu i tjuma’?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: iazui nikai. sau ljivavau a kiminm.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: izua a caucau a caucau i tjuma’?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: sulja cuai angaken na ini’ ka pacun tja nusun na suljivatje sun?
ch: B:是sulja阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s sulja. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: ui na suljivat a ken.vaca’ aken na ljimizau tja nusun.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: mai nu tji tjama?
en: Where is your father?

ab: izaua i kakesan ku djau lau.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: manu tji selep.
en: Where did selep go?

ab: vai ka sema pukukan a djemekep ta kuka.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: vuvu mantjez anga men.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: neka’ i tjuma’ tja suvuvu izua i vavua kaljavu i tjuma’.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: matjez anga sun ayau kama i palan.
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: cuai a ngaken ini’ ka pacun tja nusun. meaca anga sun.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: melevatjin a pacun tja nusun.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: za sa panguralj se’tju a pasa pinsan.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: cuai a ngasun a ini’ka kivala ku aivuau tjaiza sa tjen a matjvetjevel a kaiv.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: pumayanga tjemekel a ken ta ucia ka mesen iladi sa tja mare aivuivu.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: maljimalji aru tjuma’ anga aken.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: tjau kinesakesa aicu a kuka kacu sa su kanin i tjuma’.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
